title: xanthoxalis corniculata subsp. repens
intro: Xanthoxalis corniculata subsp. repens, also known as creeping wintergreen, is a perennial plant that belongs to the oxalis family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high content of oxalic acid and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthoxalis corniculata subsp. repens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, creeping wintergreen is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture, and is also used in some traditional remedies for skin conditions and respiratory issues.
